compiled_state.title: Write failing structural test for plugin consent design document
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Done Definition
Create tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh as an executable bash test that asserts the design document plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md:
1. Exists (file present)
2. Contains a '## Success Path' OR '## Failure Path' section header
3. References 'extraKnownMarketplaces'
4. Contains the word 'authoritative' (confirming which path is declared authoritative)

The test must FAIL (RED) before the design document is created. All assertions should print clear FAIL messages and exit non-zero.

## TDD Requirement
Test function: test_plugin_consent_doc_has_required_sections
Given: plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md does not yet exist
When: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh
Then: exits 1 with 'FAIL: Design doc not found' or equivalent FAIL message

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh (create, chmod +x)
- .test-index (add entry mapping design doc to test file)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after all tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (no lint errors introduced)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh
- [ ] Running the test fails RED before design doc is created
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index updated with entry mapping design doc to test file
  Verify: grep -q 'dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
